objectives: Discover target domains and identify potential vulnerabilities
Map and catalog target domains for efficient testing
tools: Web crawling and scraping tools (e.g., Ahrefs, Scrapy)
Social media and online presence mapping tools (e.g., Hootsuite, Brand24)
success_criteria: Complete domain mapping for all target domains
Identify at least 10 potential vulnerabilities or areas for improvement per domain

objectives: Identify potential vulnerability classes and patterns
Develop hypotheses and testable hypotheses for each vulnerability class
tools: Smart contract analysis tools (e.g., Etherscan, Remix)
Threat modeling and attack surface analysis tools (e.g., threat modeling frameworks, OWASP ZAP)
success_criteria: Develop at least 20 testable hypotheses for each vulnerability class
Identify at least 5 potential vulnerability classes with high priority

objectives: Test hypotheses with payloads and simulate attacks
Validate findings and gather exploitable data
tools: Smart contract testing frameworks (e.g., Truffle, Solidity)
Exploit development frameworks (e.g., Metasploit, Burp Suite)
Mocking and stubbing tools (e.g., Mockk, StubHub)
success_criteria: Test at least 50 hypotheses with payloads and gather exploitable data for each vulnerability class
Identify at least 2 critical vulnerabilities with high-severity and high-priority

objectives: Classify vulnerabilities according to severity and risk
tools: Triage and prioritization tools (e.g., JIRA, Trello)
success_criteria: Classify vulnerabilities according to severity and risk
Prioritize findings according to Immunefi Vulnerability Severity Classification System V2.3

objectives: Create actionable recommendations and mitigation plans
tools: Reporting and documentation tools (e.g., Markdown, Jekyll)
Template and template engine tools (e.g., Handlebars, Mustache)
success_criteria: Create actionable recommendations and mitigation plans for each vulnerability
Document findings and submissions according to program rules

priority_targets: Threat modeling and attack surface analysis
